Details / Specific Requirements: Official name, OTA listing name, common name (for guest guidance)
Notes: Must match PMS registered name

Details / Specific Requirements: Full street address (Japanese + romanized). Building name, unit number. Accurate Google Maps pin (URL)
Notes: Pre-verify Google Maps pin is correct

Details / Specific Requirements: Hotel / Minpaku (home-sharing) / Ryokan / Monthly / Lease. Registration/license number
Notes: Affects Japanese Inn Act ID verification obligation

Details / Specific Requirements: Layout (1R/1LDK/2LDK etc.), size (sqm), room usage
Notes: Cross-check with listing

Details / Specific Requirements: Maximum guests, bed/futon breakdown (double×1, single×2 etc.). Extra bedding availability & location
Notes: Also verify fire code capacity limits

Details / Specific Requirements: Which floor the property is on, elevator availability, elevator usage (card key required etc.)
Notes: Needed for elderly/wheelchair accessibility info

Details / Specific Requirements: Latest photos of each room & facility. Not listing photos but as-is condition (exterior, entrance, rooms, kitchen, bath, toilet, beds, trash area, parking, key box etc.)
Notes: Used for manual creation & AI training

Details / Specific Requirements: 1) Building entrance method 2) Elevator/stairs 3) Room door unlock method. Photos for each step. Auto-lock status
Related Inquiry Cases: #1 CI code not received / #2 Code not working / #3 Key location
Notes: Step-by-step. Video is even better

Details / Specific Requirements: Manufacturer & model, admin login (RemoteLock etc.), code issuance rules (when activated/deactivated), battery replacement timing, emergency physical key availability
Related Inquiry Cases: #1 CI code / #2 Code not working / #21 Locked out
Notes: Needed for RemoteLock API integration setup

Details / Specific Requirements: Installation location (with photos), PIN, PIN change frequency/rules
Notes: Photos should include path from exterior to key box

Details / Specific Requirements: Spare key location (mgmt co./on-site co./in property), number of keys
Notes: Essential for faster lockout response

Details / Specific Requirements: Parking availability, location (with photos), car limit, height restrictions, rules (reservation/first-come). If no parking → nearest coin parking info
Notes: Height restrictions important (some vans won't fit)

Details / Specific Requirements: Station name, exit number, walk time, landmark directions. If bus → bus line & stop name. Airport route
Notes: Include landmarks visible at night

Details / Specific Requirements: SSID (network name), password, router location, router restart method (power plug location). If mobile router → charging location
Notes: Router photo (power button location) essential

Details / Specific Requirements: Remote photo, basic operation (cool/heat toggle, temp adjustment) in multiple languages. Remote location. Battery type. If multiple units → room-to-remote mapping
Related Inquiry Cases: #11 AC how to use / #12 AC not working
Notes: English translation overlay on Japanese remote photo ideal

Details / Specific Requirements: Water heater remote location & operation. Gas meter location (photo) & reset procedure. Gas stove usage. Winter freeze prevention measures
Notes: Gas meter photo essential (guest can self-reset)

Details / Specific Requirements: Shutoff valve locations (toilet, kitchen, sink — photos of each). Plunger storage location. Drain locations. Main valve location
Related Inquiry Cases: #14 Toilet clogged / #15 No water / #48 Water leak
Notes: One of the most critical emergency info items

Details / Specific Requirements: Stove type (IH/gas) & operation. Microwave/toaster/rice cooker/dishwasher availability & usage. Fridge location. Cookware & dish inventory & storage
Related Inquiry Cases: #16 Stove usage / #17 Appliance usage / #18 Cookware missing
Notes: Appliance panel photos essential

Details / Specific Requirements: Location, operation (button explanations), detergent location, dryer function, clothesline location. If coin-operated → pricing
Notes: English translation of operation panel

Details / Specific Requirements: TV remote operation, input switching. Chromecast/FireTV/AppleTV availability & usage. Bluetooth speakers etc.
Notes: Detailed streaming device instructions if available

Details / Specific Requirements: Panel location (photo), reset procedure when tripped, breaker-to-area mapping (kitchen/AC/lights etc.)
Related Inquiry Cases: #19 Lights won't turn on / #49 Power outage
Notes: Include power usage warnings (simultaneous use limits)

Details / Specific Requirements: Light switch locations per room. Dimmer operation. Special/indirect lighting operation
Notes: Essential if switches are in non-obvious locations

Details / Specific Requirements: Provided amenities list (towel count, toothbrush, shampoo etc.). Spare storage locations (toilet paper, towels etc.). Cleaning supplies location (vacuum, broom). Insecticide location
Related Inquiry Cases: #27 Extra towels / #28 Consumable replenishment / #30 Bug found
Notes: Spare locations especially important (enables guest self-service)

Details / Specific Requirements: Bed sizes per room (single/double/queen). Extra futon location & usage. Extra pillow stock
Notes: Verify matches listing

Details / Specific Requirements: Sorting method (burnable/non-burnable/PET bottles/cans/glass/cardboard), collection days, disposal area location (photo), designated bag requirements & storage
Notes: Needed for multilingual sorting guide creation

Details / Specific Requirements: ISP name, contract plan, speed, ISP support phone number. Trouble contact
Notes: Needed for ISP contact when speed is slow

Details / Specific Requirements: Power company name, contracted amperage, simultaneous usage warnings (e.g. AC+IH+dryer trips breaker). Power co. contact
Notes: Especially important for properties with frequent breaker trips

Details / Specific Requirements: Gas company name, contact phone, city gas/propane type. Gas meter number
Notes: Needed for gas company contact when gas stops

Details / Specific Requirements: Water bureau contact. Main valve location. Winter freeze risk & prevention measures
Notes: Freeze prevention manual essential for cold-region properties

Details / Specific Requirements: Standard CI time (e.g. 15:00), standard CO time (e.g. 10:00). Early CI/Late CO availability, conditions, extra fees
Notes: Also confirm cleaning buffer times

Details / Specific Requirements: Guest tasks at CO: gather trash, clean dishes, close windows, turn off AC, key return method, sheet handling etc.
Notes: Often varies by property

Details / Specific Requirements: Quiet hours (e.g. 22:00-8:00), music/TV volume limits, party prohibition. Condo management noise rules
Notes: For condo properties, include relevant mgmt regulation sections

Details / Specific Requirements: Indoor non-smoking/smoking, balcony smoking policy, designated smoking area location. Violation cleaning fee
Notes: Pre-specify violation fees clearly

Details / Specific Requirements: Pets allowed/not allowed. If allowed: type/size restrictions, extra fee, rules (crate required etc.). If not: nearest pet hotel info
Notes: Alternative info needed even if pets not allowed

Details / Specific Requirements: Visitor policy, extra guest fee, registry requirement
Notes: Related to Inn Act registry obligations

Details / Specific Requirements: Long-stay cleaning frequency & cost, linen exchange rules, waste disposal responsibility, utility cap (if any)
Notes: Essential for properties with 7+ night bookings

Details / Specific Requirements: Pre-CI/Post-CO luggage storage availability, storage location, available hours
Notes: If unavailable, provide nearby locker info as alternative

Details / Specific Requirements: Retention period, contact method, shipping method (COD mail etc.), disposal rules
Notes: Delta HQ provides template if no standard policy exists

Details / Specific Requirements: Store name, walk time, business hours. 24-hour availability
Notes: Google Maps links recommended

Details / Specific Requirements: Nearby recommended restaurants (Japanese/Western/family etc.), cafes, izakaya. Vegetarian/halal options if available
Notes: Host personal recommendations appreciated by guests

Details / Specific Requirements: Major attractions, experience activities (skiing, hot springs etc.), partner facilities & discounts
Notes: If partner facilities exist, include booking flow

Details / Specific Requirements: Nearest hospital/clinic name, address, phone, hours. Night emergency hospital. Foreign-language medical facilities. Nearest pharmacy
Notes: English-capable hospitals especially important

Details / Specific Requirements: Name, location, hours, pricing (essential if no in-unit washer)
Notes: Essential if property has no washer

Details / Specific Requirements: Station coin locker locations, ecbo cloak or similar luggage storage services
Notes: Essential for properties that don't offer luggage storage

Details / Specific Requirements: Company name, phone, available hours, service area, repair types (plumbing/electrical/gas/locks etc.). 24h availability
Related Inquiry Cases: #12 AC broken / #13 No hot water / #14 Toilet / #15 No water / #19 Electrical
Notes: Organize by category if multiple companies

Details / Specific Requirements: Company name, phone, available hours, response time estimate, scope (lockout/noise/safety check etc.), cost
Related Inquiry Cases: #21 Locked out / #22 Suspicious person / #24 Noise response
Notes: 24h availability is critical

Details / Specific Requirements: Company name, person in charge, phone, standard cleaning time, emergency availability, linen exchange rules
Related Inquiry Cases: #25 Dirty room / #26 Mid-stay clean / #27 Extra towels / #43 Lost item check
Notes: Also confirm cleaning completion notification method

Details / Specific Requirements: Mgmt co. name, phone, manager on-duty hours, common area trouble contact, emergency contact (night)
Related Inquiry Cases: #23 Noise / #48 Water leak / #59 Mgmt co. complaint
Notes: Also recommended to obtain copy of mgmt regulations

Details / Specific Requirements: Owner name, phone, email, LINE etc. Available hours. Emergency policy (repair cost approval rules, amount ceiling etc.)
Related Inquiry Cases: #58 Repair approval / #54 Refund decision / all emergencies
Notes: Pre-agree on cost approval ceiling

Details / Specific Requirements: Company name, phone, available hours
Notes: Essential for mountain/warm climate properties

Details / Specific Requirements: Standard cleaning procedure, checklist, completion report method. Post-clean photo rules
Notes: Serves as cleaning quality standard

Details / Specific Requirements: Standard setup per guest: bath towels/face towels/hand towels. Sheet/pillowcase types & sizes. Spare storage location
Notes: Setup standards based on guest count

Details / Specific Requirements: Shampoo/conditioner/body wash/hand soap/toothbrush/razor/cotton swabs/tissue/toilet paper — items and quantities. Spare stock location
Notes: Note brand specifications if any

Details / Specific Requirements: Active OTA list (Airbnb/Booking.com/Expedia/Rakuten etc.), listing URLs for each, admin login credentials (if proxy operation needed)
Notes: Pre-agree on proxy operation authority scope

Details / Specific Requirements: Base rate, extra guest fee, cleaning fee, parking fee, pet fee, other option fees. Seasonal pricing. Long-stay discounts
Notes: Directly impacts pricing inquiry responses

Details / Specific Requirements: Cancellation policy per OTA, direct booking cancellation policy, refund rules
Notes: May differ by OTA

Details / Specific Requirements: Accepted payment methods (credit card/cash/bank transfer etc.), billing timing
Receipt issuance availability, name change availability, invoice registration number availability
Notes: Especially important for properties with many corporate guests

Details / Specific Requirements: Monthly/weekly report desired content (occupancy, revenue, incident list etc.), reporting method (email/LINE/dashboard)
Notes: Customize per owner

Details / Specific Requirements: Repair cost threshold requiring pre-approval (e.g. under ¥10,000 → post-report OK, above → pre-approval). Emergency exception rules
Notes: Pre-agree for cases that can't wait for approval

Details / Specific Requirements: Maximum refund/compensation amount delegated to CS team. Escalation rules for amounts exceeding threshold
Notes: Directly impacts complaint response speed

Details / Specific Requirements: Fire insurance / facility liability insurance status, insurance company & policy number, contact. Guest damage claim flow
Notes: Needed for insurance claims in case of accidents
